creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196047
update to 0.7.1

Simple update to 0.7.1.
Port changes:
- remove DEFAULTCONF option
- add FISH option

Program changelog:
- many bugfixes
- new setting: verbose
- fix the initial floating position of new windows by taking their position relative to the nearest hlwm monitor
- new example script: float-maximize.sh

http://herbstluftwm.org/news.html
